creator: bsd@philippost.de
text:
After updating the system to 14.2-Release (from source; GENERIC kernel), the situation is essentially unchanged.

With the amdgpu kernel module from drm-515-kmod-5.15.160_1, the kernel still panics with the same page fault as initially reported.

With the amdgpu kernel module from drm-61-kmod-6.1.92_2, the system still hangs with the same console output as in the transcript from my initial report.

Is there anything else I could try?
